hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】社区银行集团推出针对《澄清法案》稳定币奖励语言的新广告活动；【FINANCE】从初创公司到 1.8 万亿美元：抓住 SpaceX 机会的投资者现在获得了回报；【FINANCE】尽管通胀担忧加剧，金价仍跌至 6 个月低点。这就是金条失宠的原因。

items.title: Community bank group launches new ad campaign targeting Clarity Act stablecoin reward language
items.summary: A key group representing small to mid-sized community banks plans to launch a new ad warning of risks in digital assets.

items.summary_zh: 代表中小型社区银行的一个重要团体计划推出新的数字资产风险广告警告。

items.title: From startup to $1.8 trillion: The investors who took a chance on SpaceX now reap the rewards
items.summary: With SpaceX seeking an IPO valuation of nearly $1.8 trillion, early bets are poised to generate some of the biggest paper gains in venture capital history.
items.title_zh: 从初创公司到 1.8 万亿美元：抓住 SpaceX 机会的投资者现在获得了回报
items.summary_zh: 随着 SpaceX 寻求近 1.8 万亿美元的 IPO 估值，早期押注有望创造风险投资历史上最大的账面收益。

items.title: Gold slumps to 6-month low even as inflation fears rise. Here's why bullion is out of favor
items.summary: The yellow metal is at its lowest level of the year as potential interest rate increases and faltering technical signals weigh on prices.
items.title_zh: 尽管通胀担忧加剧，金价仍跌至 6 个月低点。这就是金条失宠的原因
items.summary_zh: 由于潜在利率上升和技术信号不稳定对价格造成压力，黄金正处于今年的最低水平。

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
items.title_zh: BBVA 通过 OpenAI 将人工智能置于银行业的核心
items.summary_zh: 了解 BBVA 如何将 ChatGPT Enterprise 扩展到 100,000 名员工，并与 OpenAI 合作，加速全球人工智能驱动的银行业转型。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Again Claims Deal Is Close After Retracting Threat of Strikes
items.summary: Claiming there was progress in peace negotiations, President Trump said he had canceled the next wave of planned attacks after two days of U.S. airstrikes.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普在撤回袭击威胁后再次声称协议已接近
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统声称和平谈判取得了进展，并表示在美国两天的空袭之后，他已经取消了下一波计划中的袭击。

items.title: JPMorgan says debasement trade retreat has ‘accelerated’ for bitcoin
items.summary: The retreat from the debasement trade has continued for gold and accelerated for bitcoin in recent weeks, JPMorgan analysts said.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示比特币贬值贸易回撤“加速”
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通分析师表示，最近几周，黄金继续从贬值交易中撤退，而比特币则加速撤退。

items.title: ‘You sell what you can, not what you want’: Jack Mallers says bitcoin is pricing a global liquidity crisis
items.summary: Strike CEO Jack Mallers says Bitcoin at $63,000 reflects a liquidity-starved world, and questions Strategy's perpetual stock capital dynamic.
items.title_zh: “你可以卖你能卖的东西，而不是你想要的东西”：杰克·马勒斯表示，比特币正在为全球流动性危机定价
items.summary_zh: Strike 首席执行官杰克·马勒斯 (Jack Mallers) 表示，63,000 美元的比特币反映了一个流动性匮乏的世界，并对 Strategy 的永久股本动态提出质疑。

items.title: The Incentive Dynamic Engine: io.net’s Shift to Sustainable Tokenomics
items.summary: DePIN Needs a Tokenomics Reset In recent years, DePINs have surged in prominence, offering a revolutionary model for scaling physical infrastructure through community-driven participation. By leveraging blockchain to coordinate resources like compute power and storage, these prot
items.title_zh: 激励动态引擎：io.net 向可持续代币经济的转变
items.summary_zh: DePIN 需要重置代币经济学 近年来，DePIN 的地位日益凸显，为通过社区驱动的参与来扩展物理基础设施提供了革命性的模式。通过利用区块链来协调计算能力和存储等资源，这些优势

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: KKR says AI productivity boom to keep on going — but warns of 'extreme' trend not seen since the 19th century
items.summary: KKR said in its mid-year outlook Thursday that AI will drive economic growth for years to come, but only in specific sectors.
items.title_zh: KKR 表示人工智能生产力繁荣将持续下去，但警告称，可能会出现 19 世纪以来从未出现过的“极端”趋势
items.summary_zh: KKR 在周四的年中展望中表示，人工智能将在未来几年推动经济增长，但仅限于特定领域。

items.title: Citigroup shares outperform down market after Trump endorsement
items.summary: Jane Fraser-led Citi fell 1%, less than the rest of the market and some other major banks, after Trump lauded its turnaround in a social media post.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持后，花旗集团股价跑赢下跌市场
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普在社交媒体帖子中赞扬花旗集团的转变后，简·弗雷泽领导的花旗集团股价下跌 1%，跌幅低于市场其他股票和其他一些主要银行。

items.title: Regulators' proposed prediction markets rules ban trading on terrorism, assassinations
items.summary: The proposed rules from the commission will now face a public comment period.

items.summary_zh: 该委员会拟议的规则现在将面临公众意见征询期。

items.title: Deadly Sudan drone strike targets funeral procession
items.summary: Rights groups accuse the RSF paramilitary group of killing civilians in el-Obeid, a city on the civil war's front line.
items.title_zh: 苏丹致命无人机袭击送葬队伍
items.summary_zh: 人权组织指责无国界医生组织准军事组织在内战前线城市奥贝德杀害平民。

items.title: 13 Afghan Civilians Killed in Airstrikes on Pakistan Border, U.N. Says
items.summary: Pakistan said its airstrikes targeted militant camps. The United Nations confirmed reports by the Taliban government that mostly women and children were killed.
items.title_zh: 联合国表示，巴基斯坦边境空袭造成 13 名阿富汗平民死亡
items.summary_zh: 巴基斯坦表示，其空袭目标是武装分子营地。联合国证实了塔利班政府的报告，称大部分妇女和儿童被杀。

items.title: The War in Ukraine Has Now Gone On Longer Than World War I
items.summary: Parallels between the two wars abound, from the grinding nature of the fighting to the way new technologies reshaped warfare.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰战争的持续时间比第一次世界大战还长
items.summary_zh: 从战斗的残酷性到新技术重塑战争的方式，这两场战争之间有很多相似之处。

items.title: Israel Set to Rapidly Expand West Bank Settlement
items.summary: In a major push, the government is rushing to place temporary housing at about 60 empty sites in the Israeli-occupied West Bank before national elections this fall.
items.title_zh: 以色列将迅速扩大西岸定居点
items.summary_zh: 在今年秋季全国选举之前，政府正大力推动在以色列占领的约旦河西岸约 60 个空地安置临时住房。

items.title: Banking rails are moving past the 'stablecoin winner' narrative: Sygnum
items.summary: Digital asset bank Sygnum says institutional clients want multiple tokenized cash instruments operating interchangeably on a single platform.
items.title_zh: Sygnum：银行业轨道正在超越“稳定币赢家”的说法
items.summary_zh: 数字资产银行 Sygnum 表示，机构客户希望多种代币化现金工具在单一平台上可互换运行。

items.title: Crypto for Advisors: Crypto ETFs
items.summary: Global crypto ETFs saw significant outflows in May, but diversified exposures showed relative resilience; we explore what the data signals for long-term investors.
items.title_zh: 顾问的加密货币：加密货币 ETF

items.title: Canton Network developer raises $355 million to bring Wall Street onchain
items.summary: The investment comes as blockchains designed for big banks and institutions are having a moment, with Stripe's Tempo and Circle's Arc raising hundreds of millions of dollars.

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: A Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary_zh: A Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.

items.title: Coinbase launches AI agent accounts that can trade and spend on your behalf
items.summary: "Coinbase for Agents" is a new platform that lets AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude connect to users’ Coinbase accounts to trade crypto, access data and eventually make payments and purchases autonomously.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 推出人工智能代理账户，可以代表您进行交易和支出
items.summary_zh: “Coinbase for Agents”是一个新平台，可让 ChatGPT 和 Claude 等人工智能助手连接到用户的 Coinbase 账户来交易加密货币、访问数据并最终自主付款和购买。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI) gains 4.5% as all constituents rise
items.summary: Solana (SOL), up 2.6% from Wednesday, was also a top performer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：随着所有成分股上涨，Uniswap (UNI) 上涨 4.5%
items.summary_zh: Solana (SOL) 较周三上涨 2.6%，也是表现最好的股票。

items.title: Man who spent 1,500 BTC on graphics card now helps insure bitcoin holders
items.summary: Bitsurance, insures clients' bitcoin against "physical attacks" like fire, water, robbery and the "$5 Wrench Attack."
items.title_zh: 花费 1,500 BTC 购买显卡的男子现在帮助为比特币持有者提供保险
items.summary_zh: Bitsurance 确保客户的比特币免受火、水、抢劫等“物理攻击”和“5 美元扳手攻击”。

items.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
items.summary: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.

items.title_zh: North Mini Code 简介：Cohere 为开发人员提供的第一个模型

items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机伦理研究研讨会汇集了从事技术伦理和社会影响核心工作的专家和研究人员。

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: SpaceX raising $75 billion in record-setting IPO as Nasdaq debut awaits
items.summary: SpaceX is selling 555.6 shares at $135 a piece, raising $75 billion in the largest IPO on record.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 在纳斯达克首次公开募股中筹集了 750 亿美元创纪录的资金
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 以每股 135 美元的价格出售 555.6 股股票，筹集了 750 亿美元的资金，这是有记录以来最大规模的 IPO。

items.title: SpaceX cuts retail IPO allocation to low 20% range, source says
items.summary: The Elon Musk-led company plans to direct a percentage in the low 20s of the offering to retail buyers, according to a person familiar with the matter.
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，SpaceX 将零售 IPO 分配削减至 20%
items.summary_zh: 据一位知情人士透露，这家由埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 领导的公司计划将 20% 左右的产品直接面向零售买家。

items.title: SpaceX to close above $2 trillion market cap on its debut, prediction market traders say
items.summary: Traders on Polymarket think it's likely SpaceX will join a group of just six companies with a market value beyond $2 trillion.
items.title_zh: 预测市场交易员表示，SpaceX 首次亮相时的收盘价将突破 2 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 的交易员认为 SpaceX 很可能会加入由六家公司组成、市值超过 2 万亿美元的行列。

items.title: North Carolina treasurer passes on SpaceX citing valuation concerns; favors OpenAI, Anthropic
items.summary: North Carolina has invested heavily in AI startups OpenAI and Anthropic while avoiding a direct stake in SpaceX.
items.title_zh: 北卡罗来纳州财长以估值担忧为由放弃了 SpaceX；支持 OpenAI、Anthropic
items.summary_zh: 北卡罗来纳州对人工智能初创公司 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 进行了大量投资，同时避免直接持有 SpaceX 的股份。

items.title: Beijing escalating AI espionage to catch up with the U.S. on tech, cybersecurity firm says
items.summary: U.S. cybersecurity giant CrowdStrike said China-based entities made over half of state-sponsored cyberattacks on tech firms for artificial intelligence assets.
items.title_zh: 网络安全公司称，北京正在升级人工智能间谍活动，以在科技领域赶上美国
items.summary_zh: 美国网络安全巨头 CrowdStrike 表示，超过一半的国家资助的针对科技公司的人工智能资产网络攻击是由中国实体发起的。

items.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes, scientists say
items.summary: An El Niño event has officially started, say US scientists, raising fears of extreme weather and higher temperatures.
items.title_zh: 科学家称厄尔尼诺现象正在发生并威胁极端天气
items.summary_zh: 美国科学家表示，厄尔尼诺现象已经正式开始，引发了人们对极端天气和高温的担忧。

items.title: World Cup kicks off in Mexico with Shakira, dancing, and protests
items.summary: There was a star-studded opening ceremony, and some sporadic clashes between police and protesters around the Azteca stadium.
items.title_zh: 世界杯在墨西哥拉开帷幕，夏奇拉、舞蹈和抗议
items.summary_zh: 开幕式众星云集，阿兹特克体育场周围警察和抗议者之间发生了一些零星冲突。

items.title: Nigeria evacuates citizens from South Africa as anti-migrant sentiment rises
items.summary: Nigeria is the latest African state to repatriate citizens following reports of xenophobic attacks.
items.title_zh: 随着反移民情绪高涨，尼日利亚从南非撤离公民
items.summary_zh: 尼日利亚是最新一个在接到仇外袭击报告后遣返公民的非洲国家。

items.title: The furious dispute over what caused Air India flight 171 to crash
items.summary: The final conclusions of the investigation have yet to be published, although more could become apparent in the coming days.
items.title_zh: 印度航空171号航班坠毁原因引发激烈争论
items.summary_zh: 调查的最终结论尚未公布，但未来几天可能会公布更多结论。

items.title: Vance says Israeli PM Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
items.summary: The US vice-president says the Israeli leader "aggressively asserts" his country's interests, but they do not always align with those of the US.
items.title_zh: 万斯称以色列总理内塔尼亚胡“犯了一些错误”
items.summary_zh: 美国副总统表示，以色列领导人“积极维护”其国家的利益，但这些利益并不总是与美国的利益保持一致。

items.title: Artan to referee Uefa Super Cup after losing World Cup role
items.summary: Somali referee Omar Artan is appointed to take charge of the Uefa Super Cup match between Paris St-Germain and Aston Villa later this summer after being denied a spot at the World Cup.
items.title_zh: 阿尔坦在失去世界杯裁判后将担任欧洲超级杯裁判
items.summary_zh: 索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦在被拒绝参加世界杯后，被任命负责今年夏天晚些时候巴黎圣日耳曼队和阿斯顿维拉队之间的欧洲超级杯比赛。

items.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight perilous journeys of migrants
items.summary: The Pope is appealing for a humane approach and respectful welcome for migrants seeking a better life.
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥访问加那利群岛强调移民的危险旅程
items.summary_zh: 教宗呼吁对寻求更好生活的移民采取人道的态度和尊重的欢迎。

items.title: Knicks fans go wild as New York team makes biggest comeback in NBA Finals history
items.summary: Wednesday's result means the team are now just one win away from a famous Finals win.
items.title_zh: 尼克斯队球迷疯狂，纽约队实现 NBA 总决赛历史上最大的逆转
items.summary_zh: 周三的结果意味着球队现在距离著名的总决赛胜利仅差一场胜利。

items.title: Olivia Rodrigo sings about heartbreak but she's already chosen her wedding song
items.summary: The pop star discusses the difficulty of writing happy songs, and her Glastonbury anxiety attack.
items.title_zh: 奥利维亚·罗德里戈 (Olivia Rodrigo) 唱着关于心碎的歌，但她已经选择了婚礼歌曲
items.summary_zh: 这位流行歌星讨论了创作快乐歌曲的困难，以及她的格拉斯顿伯里焦虑症。

items.title: U.K. Defense Secretary Resigns, in a Blow to Starmer
items.summary: John Healey unexpectedly announced that he was stepping down, saying Prime Minister Keir Starmer was failing to invest enough money in the British military.
items.title_zh: 英国国防部长辞职，对斯塔默造成打击
items.summary_zh: 约翰·希利出人意料地宣布辞职，称首相基尔·斯塔默未能向英国军队投入足够的资金。

items.title: This Is Mexico and Canada’s World Cup, Too. Don’t Expect Unity.
items.summary: Mexico and Canada have faced significant recent tension in their relations with the United States. But in their historic World Cup bid, the three countries promoted teamwork.
items.title_zh: 这也是墨西哥和加拿大的世界杯。不要指望团结。
items.summary_zh: 墨西哥和加拿大最近与美国的关系面临严重紧张。但在历史性的世界杯申办中，这三个国家提倡团队合作。

items.title: Women Who Fled Iran Are to Be Deported to Central African Republic, Lawyers Say
items.summary: The women are among nearly two dozen people slated to be sent to a country where the U.S. government has advised “Do not travel for any reason.”
items.title_zh: 律师称，逃离伊朗的妇女将被驱逐到中非共和国
items.summary_zh: 这些女性是计划被送往美国政府建议“不要以任何理由旅行”的国家的近两打人之一。

items.title: U.S. Blocks Deal by Florida-based Vanguard Energy to Supply Fuel to Cuba
items.summary: The deal to ship 250,000 barrels of fuel to Cuba could have eased an energy crisis. But the Trump administration says Vanguard Energy lacks the authorization to proceed.

items.summary_zh: 向古巴运送 25 万桶燃料的协议本可以缓解能源危机。但特朗普政府表示，先锋能源公司缺乏继续行动的授权。

items.title: Toronto Police Officer Fatally Shot While Investigating U.S. Consulate Shooting
items.summary: The officer was shot on Thursday while investigating the firing of a gun outside the U.S. consulate in March, the authorities said.

items.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX prices shares at $135, raising $75 billion in largest-ever IPO
items.summary: The company's fully diluted value will be about $1.8 trillion, with the stock set to open for trade on Friday on the Nasdaq.
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 将股价定为 135 美元，筹集 750 亿美元，史上规模最大的 IPO
items.summary_zh: 该公司完全摊薄后的价值约为 1.8 万亿美元，该股将于周五在纳斯达克上市交易。

items.title: U.S. House bill would erect crypto-theft task force across law enforcement agencies
items.summary: New legislation from a bipartisan duo would set up a multi-agency group under the U.S. attorney general to take a lead on cryptocurrency theft cases.

items.title: SpaceX stock is coming to Solana on the same day it lists on Nasdaq
items.summary: The firms making that possible say eligible shares can also be converted back into tokens, creating a bridge between traditional brokerage accounts and blockchain-based markets.

items.title: Americans secretly drove as much as $34 billion in offshore prediction market bets, new report claims
